name: Mobaroknama
overview: Once an accomplished lawyer, Mobarok had retired after a case had rocked his moral foundation. Suddenly, a sensational case jolts the now-jaded man. Even after knowing that defeat in the case is inevitable, Mobarok returns to court because victory there is the only way to atone for his past mistake!

trailers.title: Official Trailer - Mobaroknama (মোবারকনামা) | Mosharraf Karim | 21st December | hoichoi
